headline: Is ServiceNow (NOW) Resetting After A 52% Slide And DCF Upside Scenario?
summary: Some investors may be wondering whether ServiceNow's share price reflects its current value, or whether the recent weakness is creating a more attractive entry point for patient investors. The stock last closed at US$93.59, with a 6.0% gain over the past week, a 6.9% decline over the last 30 days, a 36.5% decline year to date, and a 52.0% decline over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on how a sharp one year pullback compares with the stock's modest 3.4% three year and 2.9% five...

headline: Why ServiceNow (NOW) Is Expanding Control Over Enterprise AI Agents
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the best data governance stocks to buy for AI compliance. On May 5, 2026, ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) expanded AI Control Tower with capabilities to discover, observe, govern, secure, and measure AI systems, agents, and workflows across enterprise environments.
